core_mechanism: renormalization-group flow near a fixed point at which an added perturbation is marginally irrelevant, so it does not change the universality class but produces universal logarithmic corrections to the leading power-law scaling
brief_reason: The abstract derives the critical behavior from renormalization-group equations in which disorder is a marginally irrelevant perturbation at the Ising fixed point, and centers on the universality of the resulting logarithmic corrections.
